turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I need a refill for my blood pressure medication. Dr. Ghosh had prescribed it about two months ago.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure! Could you share your name, registered number, and the name of the medication if you remember it?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'm Asha Fernandes, number is 9900112233. The medicine is Amlodipine 5mg, I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Ms. Fernandes. I can see your prescription history. Dr. Ghosh's last prescription for Amlodipine 5mg is on file. I'll send a refill request to the doctor for approval. Typically it's confirmed within 24 hours and you can collect from our pharmacy counter.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can they courier it? I live a bit far.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we do offer home delivery through our pharmacy partner for a nominal charge. I'll add that note to the request. You'll get a call to confirm the address and delivery slot once the doctor approves.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help, Ms. Fernandes. Take care and stay healthy!
